label: FWC Saltwater Recreational Regulations
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Primary index for Florida state-water recreational saltwater regulations.

label: FWC Red Drum
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Regional red drum slot and vessel limits.

label: FWC Black Drum
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Statewide slot with one fish allowed over 24 inches.

label: FWC Snook
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Regional seasonal closures and slot limits. Applies in inland, state, and adjacent federal waters.

label: FWC Spotted Seatrout
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: FWC notes that newly approved rules begin on 2026-04-01.

label: FWC Permit, Florida Pompano and African Pompano
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Contains statewide Florida pompano recreational limits and permit special zone rules.

label: FWC Tarpon
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Catch-and-release only unless fishing for a record with a purchased tag.

label: FWC General Statewide Bag and Length Limits
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Statewide black bass and crappie limits.

label: FWC Fish Management Areas
authority: Florida Fish and Wildlife Conservation Commission
notes: Used for special waterbody overrides such as Lake Victor.

label: NOAA Current Fishing Regulations - South Atlantic
notes: Federal-water support source for future offshore expansion; not fully ingested in the MVP dataset.
